question: When and where will the 4th International Conference on WELA 2026 be held?
gold_answer: WELA 2026 will be held at the Cavite State University International Convention Center on March 17-19, 2026.

response.text: Maraming events ang CvSU sa buong taon: Founding Anniversary tuwing huling bahagi ng Enero (ika-120 noong Enero 28-29, 2026, kasama ang Gawad Laya at Diwa), Intramurals, Research Symposium, Career/Job Fair, Cultural Festival, at Graduation. Nagho-host din ang CvSU ng mga international conference sa CvSU International Convention Center (hal. WELA 2026, Marso 17-19, 2026). Para sa tiyak na petsa at opisyal na schedule, sundan ang opisyal na Facebook page at www.cvsu.edu.ph.

question: What is the deadline for submitting abstracts to WELA 2026?
gold_answer: The deadline for submission of abstracts is March 5, 2026.

response.text: The deadline for submitting abstracts to WELA 2026 is until March 5, 2026, as stated in the official CvSU source. [https://cvsu.edu.ph/blog/2026/01/06/4th-international-conference-on-wela-2026/] If you need assistance with removing an incomplete grade, feel free to ask.
